system.notes: Articulated arms (Body = ½ vehicle Body) — weaker than a crane but dextrous, doing anything a metahuman arm can; base Strength scales, lifts (Strength × 50) kg, and can mount most cyberarm accessories (at half a cyberarm's cost). Strength may be bought up: parts +75,000¥/point (1–3) or +90,000¥/point (4+); base parts 25,000¥; 4 CF; load −(Strength × 25) kg; Avail 4/4 days; needs Cybertechnology B/R. Rigger 2 p.145.
